name: hero
description: The opening statement of a page: eyebrow, headline, supporting text, primary and optional secondary action, and optional media. Owns the page's single h1.

eyebrow.description: Short kicker above the headline (renders as a badge/caption).

subheading.description: One or two sentences of supporting text.

media.description: Supporting visual; omit for a centered text-only hero.

responsive.base: Single column: content stacked, media below.
responsive.lg: Split into two columns — content and media side by side (foundation split primitive).

a11y.headingLevel: h1 — the hero provides the page's one and only h1.
a11y.landmarkNote: Rendered as the first section inside <main>.
notes: Primary CTA is visually and structurally first among the actions.
If media is decorative it emits empty alt; if it carries meaning it requires descriptive alt.
Reading order matches source order: eyebrow → heading → text → actions → media.

elementor.notes: Compiles to a full-width section shell with an inner capped container split into content + media columns.

mapping.layout.split: Two flex columns that stack below lg
